title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services:
Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services!
